query:
-- 3. Hot projects with ZERO send_ready contacts — critical gap
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.location,
  p.sector,
  p.lifecycleStatus,
  p.suppressed,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cp.contactId) as total_contacts_linked,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN c.id END) as send_ready_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified' THEN c.id END) as named_unverified_count,
  MAX(c.enrichmentStatus) as last_enrichment_status
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.location, p.sector, p.lifecycleStatus, p.suppressed
HAVING send_ready_count = 0
ORDER BY total_contacts_linked DESC
LIMIT 30;

-- 3. Hot projects with ZERO send_ready contacts — critical gap
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.location,
  p.sector,
  p.lifecycleStatus,
  p.suppressed,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cp.contactId) as total_contacts_linked,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN c.id END) as send_ready_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified' THEN c.id END) as named_unverified_count,
  MAX(c.enrichmentStatus) as last_enrichment_status
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.location, p.sector, p.lifecycleStatus, p.suppressed
HAVING send_ready_count = 0
ORDER BY total_contacts_linked DESC
LIMIT 30;
